summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Xanadu Stays Guest ID Vault feature. All backend API endpoints working correctly. Frontend loads properly with dynamic Supabase config loading and no hardcoded secrets.
passed_tests: GET /api/health returns 200 with healthy status and timestamp
GET /api/vault/config returns 200 with supabase_url and supabase_anon_key (empty strings since not configured)
GET /api/vault/status returns 200 with configured:false, supabase_configured:false, r2_configured:false
GET /api/vault/guests without auth header returns 401 Unauthorized
GET /api/vault/guests with fake auth header returns 401 Unauthorized
GET /api/vault/guests with invalid auth format returns 401 Unauthorized
GET /api/bookings returns 200 with list of bookings
Bookings have all required fields (booking_id, guest_name, etc.)
Frontend index.html loads with Guest ID Vault navigation link
Frontend guest-id-vault.html loads and shows auth screen by default
Frontend guest-id-vault.html hides app content until authenticated
Frontend guest-id-vault.html displays config error banner when Supabase not configured
Frontend guest-id-vault.html has NO hardcoded Supabase URL or anon key
Frontend fetches Supabase config dynamically from /api/vault/config endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: All vault endpoints tested and working. Supabase and R2 are intentionally not configured (empty env vars). The system gracefully handles this unconfigured state by returning appropriate error messages. The vault dev server runs on port 8002 and FastAPI on port 8001 proxies /api/vault/* requests to it. Frontend dynamically loads Supabase config from /api/vault/config - no hardcoded secrets.

architecture_notes.vault_dev_server: Node.js server on port 8002 wrapping Netlify function (vault.js)
architecture_notes.fastapi_backend: Port 8001, handles /api/bookings and proxies /api/vault/* to port 8002
architecture_notes.frontend: React dev server on port 3000 serving static HTML files from /app/frontend/public/
architecture_notes.config_flow: Frontend fetches /api/vault/config → FastAPI proxies to vault dev server → Returns Supabase public config
